creator: hybris246@gmail.com
text:
Emesene port compiles, installs and loads up ok, but when logged in there is no contacts list or ability to set nick. 

Console output:

$ emesene
If you are reading this, you may want to enable debug
It's the first option in the connection tab in preferences
File /home/joe/.config/emesene1.0/hybris246_gmail_com/custom_emoticons/map does not exist, skipping
